llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', which corresponds to a rating of 7 in the ground-truth data. For activities: 'Photography Walk (Charles Bridge, Prague Castle exterior)' relates to photography and city walks, most similar to 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9); 'Hiking in Divoká Šárka Nature Reserve' aligns with 'Hiking Expedition' (rating 10); 'Cultural Exploration (Old Town Square, Jewish Quarter)' also aligns with 'City Walking Tour' (rating 9, cultural exploration context); 'Morning Yoga Class' aligns with 'Yoga Retreat' (rating 10). No additional services were included, so none are mapped.
